title: Squid Stew with German Flair
description: A hearty and flavorful squid stew infused with the rich flavors of Germany. Perfect for a cold evening.

ingredients.name: Squid
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: German Beer
ingredients.notes: used in place of some water for added flavor

instructions: Heat the xenial olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the squid and cook until opaque, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the German beer and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let simmer, covered, for 10-15 minutes or until the squid is cooked through.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
